The '''PAC20 Visual Wrist Comm''' was a wrist-mounted [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] manufactured by [[Fabritech/Legends|Fabritech]]. the model was used by the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]].

==Description==
The PAC20 Visual Wrist Comm was manufactured by [[Fabritech/Legends|Fabritech]]. It combined the audio functions of a standard [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] with a display screen that could broadcast a video transmission and display data.<ref name="EGWT" /> The flat rectangular device was easily affixed to glove or any flat surface. It was capable of displaying holoimage data, albeit only as a two-dimensional image.<ref name="AE" />

The PAC20 could function as a basic [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]], capable of storing and receiving data.<ref name="AE" /> The internal [[Computer/Legends|computer]] of the PAC20 was capable of linking the comlink to a datapad or [[Droid/Legends|droid]]. The internal [[Power cell/Legends|power cell]] was capable of broadcasting to a range of seventy-five [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]],<ref name="EGWT" /> and out to most standard [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbits]]. The power cell requiring replacement after ten [[Standard day/Legends|days]] of operation.<ref name="AE" />

==History==
The PAC20 was used by the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]], and was popular with [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] needing to see whom they were dealing with. This unit also allowed them the convenience of doing so in a hands-free manner.<ref name="AE" />
